message:
fix(export): align append_segment call signatures and newline handling

- export.rs: update append_segment calls to match simplified storage
  API (remove sequence_num and byte_count parameters). Fix newline
  assertion in write_record test to trim trailing newline before
  checking for embedded newlines. Remove unused imports.
- main.rs: minor additions for export handler wiring.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
